signals.headline: SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs, Triggering XRP's 10% April 2026 Surge Above $1
signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs, Triggering XRP's 10% April 2026 Surge Above $1.50** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1]
